title: salix × semihastata
intro: Salix × semihastata, also known as hybrid willow or bastard willow, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Salicaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its bark and leaves' high concentration of salicin and other salicylic compounds. The medicinal properties of Salix × semihastata have been found to provide relief from pain, reduce inflammation, and combat fever, making it a valuable treatment for various health conditions, including rheumatism and arthritis. Salix × semihastata can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment, making it easily accessible for herbal remedies and homeopathic treatments.
